full_text:
Gong Lu (Dexu) 龔禄 (德緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Lu (龔禄), styledDexu (德緒), was born in Ba. Aided Zhuge Liang in subjugating the south, but was killed in the conflict. Gong Lu was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Gong Lu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
